description.en_US: Create, read, and batch-update Google Docs through the official API with OAuth2.
description.zh_Hans: 通过 Google Docs 官方 API 与 OAuth2，创建、读取并批量更新文档。

description.en_US: OAuth2 credentials for accessing Google Docs API
description.zh_Hans: 用于访问 Google Docs API 的 OAuth2 凭证

hint.en_US: Create OAuth2 credentials in Google Cloud Console

tools.name: create-document

description.en_US: Create a new Google Docs document
description.zh_Hans: 创建一个新的 Google Docs 文档

hint.en_US: Title for the new Google Docs document
hint.zh_Hans: 新建 Google Docs 文档时使用的标题

tools.skill:
# Create Document Tool Documentation

## Tool

- **Name**: `create-document`
- **Purpose**: Creates a new Google Docs document with the given title.

## Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | UI Component | Description | Example |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `google_credential` | `credential_id` | `true` | credential picker | Google OAuth2 credential bound to `google-docs-oauth2`. | `"google_credential"` |
| `title` | `string` | `true` | `input` | Title of the document to create. | `"Project Weekly Report"` |

## Tool Input Example

```json
{
  "parameters": {
    "google_credential": "google_credential",
    "title": "Project Weekly Report"
  }
}
```

## Tool Output Example

```json
{
  "documentId": "1AbCdEfGhIjKlMnOp",
  "title": "Project Weekly Report"
}
```

tools.name: get-document

description.en_US: Get Google Docs document content by ID
description.zh_Hans: 根据文档 ID 读取 Google Docs 文档内容

hint.zh_Hans: 可从 docs.google.com 文档 URL 中获取

placeholder.zh_Hans: 请输入 Google Docs 文档 ID

hint.en_US: When enabled, return content in tabs field for multi-tab docs
hint.zh_Hans: 开启后，将在 tabs 字段返回多标签页文档的内容

hint.en_US: Optional; maps to documents.get suggestionsViewMode query parameter
hint.zh_Hans: 可选；对应 documents.get 查询参数 suggestionsViewMode

tools.skill:
# Get Document Tool Documentation

## Tool

- **Name**: `get-document`
- **Purpose**: Retrieves the latest content and metadata of a Google Docs document.

## Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | UI Component | Description | Example |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `google_credential` | `credential_id` | `true` | credential picker | Google OAuth2 credential bound to `google-docs-oauth2`. | `"google_credential"` |
| `document_id` | `string` | `true` | `input` | Google Docs document ID from URL. | `"1AbCdEfGhIjKlMnOp"` |
| `include_tabs_content` | `boolean` | `false` | `switch` | Whether to return content in `tabs` field for multi-tab docs. | `true` |
| `suggestions_view_mode` | `string` | `false` | `select` | Optional; same as REST `suggestionsViewMode`. | `"SUGGESTIONS_INLINE"` |

## Tool Input Example

```json
{
  "parameters": {
    "google_credential": "google_credential",
    "document_id": "1AbCdEfGhIjKlMnOp",
    "include_tabs_content": true,
    "suggestions_view_mode": "DEFAULT_FOR_CURRENT_ACCESS"
  }
}
```

## Tool Output Example

```json
{
  "documentId": "1AbCdEfGhIjKlMnOp",
  "title": "Project Weekly Report",
  "revisionId": "AAABBBCCC",
  "tabs": []
}
```
